{{Fig|In the picture above, 10 [https://youtube.com YouTube] videos featuring American biologist and 1972 Nobel prize winner [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gerald_Edelman Gerald Edelman] are available and selected for automatic import into SuperMemo from MS Edge (for easy use with [[Glossary:Incremental_video|incremental video]]). 7 videos have been detected as already imported in the [[Glossary:Collection|collection]] and marked as a duplicate (red D icon). The selected videos will be imported as [[Glossary:Child|children]] of a newly added [[Glossary:Element|element]] titled "Web import". The [[Glossary:Priority|priority]] of the imported videos will fall in the range of 0.1759-1.2147%}}
